fields.Root: The root of the view of this inspector's hiearchy.
fields.ComponentView: The currently selected slot to view components for.
fields._rootText: The text field for the display of the root hiearchy slot for this inspector's view.
fields._componentText: The text field for the display of the slot for this inspector's component view.
fields._hierarchyContentRoot: The root of the view for slots on the currently viewed slot hiearchy.
fields._componentsContentRoot: The root of the view for components on the currently selected slot.
fields._currentComponent: The current component this is looking at.
fields._currentRoot: The current root this is looking at.

methods.OnRootUpPressed: Called when the go up in hiearchy button is touched.
methods.OnObjectRootPressed: Called when the view slot component list button is touched.
methods.OnSetRootPressed: Called when the set root slot view button is touched.
methods.OnAddChildPressed: Called when the add child button is touched.
methods.OnInsertParentPressed: Called when the insert parent button is touched.
methods.OnAttachComponentPressed: Called when the attach component dialog button is touched.
methods.OnComponentSelected: Handles when a component selector is told to attach a component to the slot this is on.
methods.OnDestroyPressed: Called when the destroy button is touched.
methods.OnDestroyPreservingAssetsPressed: Called when the recycle button is touched.
methods.OnDuplicatePressed: Called when the button is touched.
